commands.review_summary:
The PR enables `typescript/no-import-type-side-effects` in `.oxlintrc.json`, disables `eslint/no-underscore-dangle`, and rewrites pure inline type-only imports across core, UI, and plugin TypeScript files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a cleanup/lint-policy PR rather than a bug report. The relevant source check is whether the final head eliminates pure inline type-only imports across the configured lint targets, and the read-only scan found none.
